description: Higher Ground required assets staged for the NWN EE bridge.

sourceArchives.description: CEP 2.3 full archive. Existing staged CEP may be used when this archive is a zero-byte placeholder.

compatibilityFixes.evidence: HG cep2_custom.hak classes.2da references these CEP prestige-package tables, but the provided HG/CEP required files do not contain them. EE demands the referenced class package 2DAs during module load; Diamond tolerates the absent resources for existing characters. Generate empty package tables as loader-safe EE compatibility resources without adding feats, skills, or prerequisites.
EE tileset loader requires Orientation in each TILE block; CEP legacy ttr01.set TILE625 omits it.

EE FuncInterp calls the model-loader whitelist and logs disallowed EXPORTFUNC commands; EE FindModel's model command classifier treats filedependency/filedependancy as the blocked command family. CEP's pfh0_robe137.mdl contains only a top-level 'filedependency Unknown' metadata line before newmodel/setsupermodel, so remove that directive in an override resource instead of changing packet translation or HAK order.

EE FuncInterp calls the model-loader whitelist and logs disallowed EXPORTFUNC commands; EE FindModel's model command classifier treats filedependency/filedependancy as the blocked command family. The driver-only EE log reported PMH0_ROBE161.mdl through that disallowed path, and the CEP cep2_core3.hak resource contains the same top-level 'filedependency Unknown' metadata line as the already-proven pfh0_robe137.mdl case. Emit a staged override that removes only that metadata directive so Diamond-authored model geometry and appearance data remain otherwise unchanged.

nwsync.name: HG Bridge Required Assets
nwsync.description: Higher Ground required assets plus EE compatibility resources for the NWN EE bridge.
